description: NorthStar Health customer persona segmentation MCP server, backed by Azure AI Search.

tools.name: list_personas
tools.description: List personas, optionally filtered by market, preferred category, age group or income band.

tools.name: search_personas
tools.description: Search personas semantically by need, motivation or behaviour.

tools.name: get_persona
tools.description: Get a single persona's full profile by id (e.g. 'GER-001').

tools.name: find_personas_by_interest
tools.description: Find personas whose health interests match a topic.
